sharedStyle.label: Prompt Advanced Feature: Shared Chat Style
sharedStyle.description: Predefine CSS that should be shared across 2D chat output. Instead of repeating style blocks in the first scene or later replies, define reusable classes here and reuse them in the body.
sharedStyle.note: Paste CSS rules only, without a style tag. This stylesheet is applied to 2D chat rendering and the prompt will describe it as an already loaded shared style.
sharedStyle.previewDescription: Preview the current first_scene with the shared chat style applied.
sharedStyle.previewEmpty: first_scene is empty, so the preview is showing a default sample scene.
sharedStyle.previewSample:
<say speaker="{{char}}">This is a sample line for style preview.</say>

Use this area to check how the shared style applies to the first scene.

interactiveUi.label: Interactive UI
interactiveUi.description: Allow interactive UI output such as buttons and input fields. This option is intended for story content only.
interactiveUi.onDesc: Allow the model to output buttons, input fields, and other interactive UI.
